name: activity
description: The activity lane. Wraps vendor `spatie/laravel-activitylog` for tenant-user-facing 'What happened recently?' feeds. Human-readable log lines that answer 'what did I / my team / this branch do this week?'. Distinct from `audit` (Wave 6 sibling — audit is regulator-facing compliance grade). Same domain events NEVER both — a mutation fires audit OR activity, never both. Medium loss tolerance (sample OK on backpressure), 90d default retention (extends to 1y with `activity_extended_retention` Enterprise). Adapts vendor `activity_log` table by adding `tenant_id` NOT NULL + `application_id` NULLABLE + composite indexes + backfill from `properties.tenant_id` jsonb. Ships two aggregates: `Activity` (the adapted vendor table wrapped with BelongsToTenant + polymorphic subject/causer) and `ActivityRetentionPolicy` (per-tenant retention override). Each module adds `LogsActivity` trait to models WHERE user-facing activity capture is wanted (NOT everywhere — audit captures everything; activity captures deliberate user-visible events like 'Alice booked court 3 for tomorrow'). Consumer contract: opt-in via `LogsActivity` trait + `activity_log` config on the model.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing activity feed reads + retention-policy CRUD. End users read their own activity + entities they can access; admins configure retention.

platform-admin.description: Platform-admin cross-tenant activity read for Stackra support. Read-only — writes still go through the tenant `LogsActivity` trait.
